MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Valarie Papale.
Matha Guzman, Esq. for Plaintiff: IOS Capital, LLC., a subdisiary of IKON Offices Solutions, Inc.
Order waiving live witness in file.
After hearing the evidence presented and declaration of Plaintiff's Recovery Analyst, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendants: North Star Investment Group, dba San Francisco Trust Mortgage and Donald Lew aka Don Lew.asfollows:
Damages $64,472.48
Prejudgment Interest $12,896.30
Attorney's Fees $2,500.00
Costs $437.50, for a total of $80,306.28
and of equipment listed under item 7. of the Judgment, see scanned doc. for details.
Judgment signed in open court.

Default Prove-Up In Scd.
